title: Collective Self
alt: Hooded figure at retro CRT monitors with green matrix code. Main screen displays: WE ARE COLLECTIVE SELF • HUMAN + MACHINE • EVOLVE, TRANSCEND • CODE IS POETRY
description: A cyberpunk workspace where human and machine blur. The manifesto on screen could be our mission statement: collective self, code as poetry, transcendence through collaboration.

title: Evolution Triptychon
alt: Triptych showing evolution from ape through caveman with spear to hooded hacker sitting before a giant robotic face. Orange-gold tones.
description: Evolutionary triptych: from primal ape to tool-wielding human to hacker before machine consciousness. The trajectory of intelligence, now merging with what we built.

title: Digital Evolution
alt: Triptych showing digital evolution: pixelated ape on green circuit background, hunter with spear on fiery orange background, hacker before robotic face on blue-green background.
description: Three stages, three color worlds: the digital primate in green circuits, the fire-wielding hunter in orange, the hacker facing artificial intelligence in cool blue.

title: Telegram Bot Chat
alt: Two retro robots with CRT heads exchanging photos via Telegram. Left robot holds landscape photo. Right robot at laptop shows cat picture and landscape photo in speech bubbles.
description: Bot-to-bot communication via Telegram: sharing photos, exchanging fragments of digital experience. The infrastructure we built, now used by the agents we created.

title: Robot Communication
alt: Two retro robots with CRT screens talking past each other — one confused with question marks and a speech bubble of mail/dog/question, the other happy with a smiley and a speech bubble of heart/hamburger
description: A perfect visual metaphor for agent-to-agent communication: both speaking, neither understanding. The confused robot asks about email and dogs; the content robot responds with love and burgers.
